title: Parent Dashboard
welcomeSubtitle: Overview of your linked children and quick links.

notSignedInDescFees: Please log in to view fees and invoices.

noGuardianProfileDesc: Your account is not linked to a guardian profile. Contact the school.
noGuardianProfileDescShort: Your account is not linked to a guardian profile.
noStudentsLinkedDesc: Contact the school to link your children to your account.
feesPageSubtitle: View invoices and payment status for your children.
noInvoicesDesc: There are no fee invoices for your linked students.
timetableSubtitle: Weekly class schedules for your children (read-only).
notAssignedToClass: Not assigned to a class yet.
assignmentsSubtitle: View assignments for your linked children (read-only).
noAssignmentsDesc: There are no assignments for your children's classes yet.
noUpcomingEventsDesc: There are no scheduled events or holidays on the calendar.
transportSubtitle: Bus route and vehicle details for your children (read-only).
performanceSubtitle: Track your {count, plural, one {child's} other {children's}} daily learning, grades, and attendance patterns.
noTimetableToday: No timetable set up yet for today
noInvoiceSelectedDesc: Choose an invoice from the fees page to view payment instructions.
invoiceNotFoundDesc: This invoice may have been removed.
accessDeniedDesc: You can only pay invoices for your linked students.
invoiceFullyPaid: This invoice is already fully paid. Thank you!
manualPaymentNote: Manual payment instructions — online card payments are not enabled yet.
payStep1: Pay {amount} via bank transfer or mobile money.
payStep2: Use reference {ref} and student name {name} in the payment description.
payStep4: Your payment will be recorded by the school and the invoice will update within 1–2 business days.
